authors: Nicole K. Stewart Joseph M. Nicolai Graeme Beamiss a School of Journalism and Mass Communication
raw_title: Twitch’s Digital News Standard: Breaking Journalistic Boundaries in Platform Streaming Environments
title_en: Twitch’s Digital News Standard: Breaking Journalistic Boundaries in Platform Streaming Environments
title_zh: Twitch的数字新闻标准：在平台流媒体环境中打破新闻边界
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了Twitch平台如何通过其流媒体环境建立新的数字新闻标准，挑战了传统新闻的边界和做法。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how the Twitch platform establishes new digital news standards through its streaming environment, challenging traditional journalistic boundaries and practices.
research_direction_zh: 探索流媒体平台如何重塑新闻生产和传播，以及数字环境对新闻业标准和边界的影响。
research_direction_en: Exploring how streaming platforms reshape news production and dissemination, and the impact of digital environments on journalistic standards and boundaries.
